generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you hear about the recent security breach in [City]? Local authorities were caught completely unprepared, and it's clear our current laws aren't enough to protect us. We need stronger domestic security powers to prevent this from happening again. Other countries are already taking action - why aren't we? #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurCommunities
